text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Scarlet. I'm preparing a present for your
birthday.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You frequently like to use aroma oils, yes? As
such, I'm concocting a blend using a new, secret
formula.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Worry not, it won't be harmful to breathe in. At
worst, some particulate matter might adhere to
you and emit a sparkling—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes, but the light is probably not what
you're imagining. You see, the seven colors—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's rainbow colored?! Wow! And you made it for
me—I'm so happy! I'll really cherish it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I can't wait to show it off. ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Is that right? Well, then I hope you'll look
forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: (Hmm... It shouldn't cause any problems, but I'm a little uneasy.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(...Perhaps I'll make a few more adjustments
before giving it to her.)
